aeo_readiness.summary: Ferrell Air has a solid foundation but lacks the structured content and authority signals needed for AI assistants to prioritize them in search results.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema to highlight their existing FAQ content.
Expand on conversational content that aligns with common HVAC queries.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with positive reviews, photos, and accurate contact information.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no detected issues.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Seek additional citation opportunities to reinforce local presence.

schema_gaps: Missing FAQPage schema despite existing FAQ content.
No HowTo schema for DIY troubleshooting guides.
LocalBusiness schema could be enhanced with more detailed service information.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured conversational content tailored to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to HVAC troubleshooting and maintenance tips.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema and expanding on conversational FAQs.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning the owner as an HVAC expert through media features and certifications.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your expertise visible to the new wave of search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, Ferrell Air misses out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistants.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their GBP is strong, but AI assistants rarely cite them due to a lack of structured, conversational content.
agency_pitch.solution: We will enhance their schema markup, create AI-friendly content, and amplify their authority signals to ensure they dominate AI search results.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI search—waiting means losing ground daily.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Growth for Ferrell Air: Are You Ready?
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found untapped potential to make Ferrell Air the go-to HVAC expert for AI search.
cta: Let’s schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your content for AI assistants and capture more leads.
